bianchi_iris.verdict: GENUINELY NEW. 3.9 independent dimensions beyond Megethos. Iris speaks with nearly 4 new voices.

groups_proteus.verdict: GENUINELY NEW. 2.0 independent dimensions beyond Megethos. Exponent and conjugacy classes are new axes.

belyi_ariadne.verdict: GENUINELY NEW. 2.0 independent dimensions. Genus and orbit size are independent of degree.

oeis_mnemosyne.verdict: PARTIALLY NEW. Megethos explains half (mean~max~growth are redundant). But monotonicity, zero_fraction, negative_fraction are 3 genuinely new voices.

charon_thalassa.verdict: ENTIRELY NEW. 9.3 effective dimensions, none mapped to Megethos. The embedding space is almost completely orthogonal to the known phoneme system.

summary.conclusion: The islands contribute ~20 new independent dimensions to the Kosmos. The original 5 phonemes (which reduce to 2 independent voices) are a tiny fraction of the full structure. The Decaphony of 10 was conservative — the true dimensionality is at least 22 (2 original + 20 from islands).
